description_long: This object is a long, slender lamppost with a cylindrical pole and a simple, functional design. The pole is straight and uniform in thickness, topped with a small, rounded lamp head that appears to house the light source. The base is slightly wider, providing stability for ground installation. The entire structure is a matte black color, giving it a modern and unobtrusive appearance suitable for urban environments. There are no visible decorative elements or attachments, emphasizing its utilitarian purpose. The lamp head is compact and streamlined, lacking any ornate features or embellishments.
description: A matte black, cylindrical lamppost with a simple, modern design and a compact lamp head. It is functional and unadorned, suitable for urban settings.
description_view_0: A narrow, end-on view showing the lamppost as a thin vertical line with the lamp head barely visible.
description_view_1: A clear side profile revealing the full length of the pole, the compact lamp head, and the slightly wider base.
description_view_2: Another end-on view similar to view 0, with the pole and lamp head aligned and minimal detail visible.
description_view_3: A mirrored side profile to view 1, showing the same features from the opposite side.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Compact, rounded modern lamp head with a streamlined appearance
